title: Amir Pnueli
body: Amir Pnueli (Hebrew: אמיר פנואלי; April 22, 1941 – November 2, 2009) was an Israeli computer scientist and the 1996 Turing Award recipient.
categories: Academic staff of Tel Aviv University
Academic staff of Weizmann Institute of Science
Courant Institute of Mathematical Sciences faculty
